title: FINGERINSPIRE 20 Yards/18.3M Heart Embroidered Jacquard Ribbon 10mm Wide Red Heart Woven Ribbon Hearts Woven Fabric Trim with Plastic Empty Spool for Gift Wrapping Garment Sewing Accessories
features: Package & Size: You will receive 20 Yards/18.3M heart pattern embroidered jacquard ribbon with a plastic empty spool. The width of the hearts woven fabric trim is about 3/8 inch(10mm). Sufficient quantity to meet your different daily needs.
Unique Design：This heart jacquard lace trim has white as the base color, decorated with red color trimming edge, with heart embroidery pattern, which are exquisite and beautiful in workmanship.

Quality Material: Our heart edge lace trim is made of high quality polyester material, which feels comfortable and soft; with exquisite workmanship, washable and durable, not easy to break or fade, can be used for a long time.

Easy to Use: You can cut it into any length as you like and then directly sew on the surface of the fabric. It's easy to operate. The elegant design with exquisite craft will decorate your crafts in chic style, can make you more charming and graceful.

Wide Application: These heart sewing lace ribbon trims are perfect for brides dress, bridal headpiece, hair flower, bridal gown applique, bridal sash sewing, scrap booking, decorating, hair bow making ,embellishing cards, floral arrangements, and clothing decoration.
description: Specifications: Material: Polyester Color: Red Shape: Heart Size: Polyester Heart Jacquard Ribbon: about 3/8 inch(10mm) wide, 20 Yards/18.3M long; Plastic Empty Spools: about 17x53~56mm, 1pc.
